Functions.Name: MakeImportanceTexture
Functions.Description: Create an FImportanceTexture object for texture-driven importance sampling from a 2D RGBA8 texture

Params.Name: Texture
Params.Description: - Texture object to use. Must be RGBA8 format.

Params.Name: WeightingFunc
Params.Description: - How to turn the texture data into probability weights

Return.Description: new ImportanceTexture object for use with ImportanceSample

Functions.Name: BreakImportanceTexture
Functions.Description: Get texture used to create an ImportanceTexture object

Params.Name: ImportanceTexture
Params.Description: - The source ImportanceTexture object

Params.Name: WeightingFunc
Params.Description: - How to turn the texture data into probability weights

Return.Description: new ImportanceTexture object for use with ImportanceSample

Functions.Name: ImportanceSample
Functions.Description: Distribute sample points proportional to Texture2D luminance.

Params.Name: Rand
Params.Description: - Random 2D point with components evenly distributed between 0 and 1

Params.Name: Samples
Params.Description: - Total number of samples that will be used

Params.Name: Intensity
Params.Description: - Total intensity for light
